notes:
vMLX 1.6.10

Urgent Bonsai affine-1 runtime and paged L2 cache release.

Highlights:
- Adds schema-2 affine1 and ternary JANG loading for text and vision-language models, including lossless 1-bit code widening for native MLX quantized kernels and per-module quantization overrides.
- Live packaged-app verification covered Bonsai-27b-1bit-JANG hybrid GDN/SSM plus attention, TurboQuant attention KV, async clean-prefill rederive, reasoning Auto/Off/On, and multi-turn requests through /v1/responses.
- Paged block-disk L2 cache is enabled by default in the engine and UI; request cleanup now performs eviction and L2 writes correctly. Live cache telemetry showed prefix reuse, paged plus SSM cached tokens, disk hits, writes, and companion-state stores.
- Chat Settings visibly reflected bundle-derived generation defaults: temperature 1.00, top-p 0.95, top-k 20, repetition penalty 1.00, and bundle-owned max tokens.
- Built-in run_command was invoked and executed from the final packaged Electron UI. Bonsai post-tool continuation can still over-generate after an empty continuation; that follow-up is not claimed fixed in this release.

Verification:
- Source commit 693b2d08302aa31fc0dda6f50a441250fc1dcfb1.
- 276 focused engine tests passed; 2206 panel tests passed with 3 skipped; TypeScript typecheck passed.
- Both DMGs are Developer ID signed by ShieldStack LLC (55KGF2S5AY), Apple notarized, stapled, and Gatekeeper accepted. Notarization IDs: Sequoia 7b8eda7e-1713-4878-8a22-150d738e8763; Tahoe a7d4fe5c-27ed-4f9b-b79c-a7a39344e5ed.

Flavors: sequoia (macosx_14 wheels; Sonoma 14.5+, Sequoia 15, Tahoe) and tahoe (native macosx_26 wheels; Tahoe only).

- vMLX-1.6.10-tahoe-arm64.dmg: 59d8b087af8c9820e224ba96fe1419350d7da3e7ffceeaca9c5c2c7cab7da9a7
